title: Figure 5 from: Jaume-Schinkel S, Müller B, Avila-Calero S, Kukowka S, Rduch V, Mengual X (2024) Preserving morphology while extracting DNA: a non-destructive field-to-museum protocol for slide-mounted specimens. Biodiversity Data Journal 12: e119448. https://doi.org/10.3897/BDJ.12.e119448
author: Jaume-Schinkel, Santiago
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 5 Total morphological structures that were lost within each shaking category. A. Interrupted shaking; B. Constant shaking. Significance values obtained from Kruskal-Wallis test with post-hoc Dunn test, Bonferroni corrected. Values: * = p < 0.05, ** = p < 0.01, *** = p < 0.001, **** = p < 0.0001. The Red dashed line indicates the mean and the blue dashed line indicates the median.
steps_raw: Figure 5 Total morphological structures that were lost within each shaking category. A. Interrupted shaking; B. Constant shaking.
